hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q "^/home/khaled/taxiapp"; then cd /home/khaled/taxiapp && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "auto: save $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"; git push 2>/dev/null || true; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
